## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? One sentence. -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code change with no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî dependency / config / build
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only

## Testing
- [ ] Tested locally against a live WP install
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests where applicable

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is `feature/*` or `fix/*` branched off `develop`
- [ ] No debug `error_log()` or `console.log()` left in
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` section updated
- [ ] Version bump in plugin header + `gohighlevel-crm-integration.php` only if this is a release PR to `main`
